moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded yesterday, July 19th, with Spain lifting the trophy after defeating Argentina in the final held across the USA, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: Final result reaction
angles.copy: What a tournament! Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions after a thrilling final against Argentina yesterday. Where were you watching?

angles.name: Tournament recap
angles.copy: After five weeks of incredible football, the FIFA World Cup 2026 has wrapped up. What was your standout moment from the whole tournament?

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026
moments.blurb: Ryan Fox was crowned Champion Golfer of the Year yesterday, July 19th, at Royal Birkdale, winning the 154th Open Championship.

angles.name: Champion reaction
angles.copy: Huge congratulations to Ryan Fox, your Champion Golfer of the Year! What a performance at Royal Birkdale to clinch The Open yesterday.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale wrap-up
angles.copy: Another incredible Open Championship at Royal Birkdale comes to a close. Who was your player of the tournament?

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The Love Island 2026 final is set to air live on Monday, July 27th, bringing another season of villa drama to a close.

angles.name: Anticipation build-up
angles.copy: Only one week until the Love Island 2026 final! Who are you rooting for to win the £50k?

angles.name: Final predictions
angles.copy: The countdown is on to the Love Island final next Monday. Which couple do you think has what it takes to go all the way?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are starting this week across much of England and Wales, with many children breaking up on July 22nd or 23rd, while schools in Scotland and Northern Ireland began earlier in July.

angles.name: Holidays start
angles.copy: Hands up if the kids are officially on summer holidays! Wishing everyone a fantastic break, whatever you're up to. ☀️

angles.name: Local school break
angles.copy: School's OUT for summer! Enjoy the long-awaited break, everyone. What are your plans for the next few weeks across South Wales?

angles.name: Devon schools out
angles.copy: The summer holidays have officially begun for many in Devon! Time for beaches, adventures, and making memories. What's first on your list?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Wrap-up
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships concluded on July 12th, seeing Jannik Sinner win the Gentlemen's singles title.

angles.name: Champions lookback
angles.copy: A week on from the finals, what was your most memorable moment from Wimbledon 2026? The grass courts always deliver!

angles.name: London tennis
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the energy of Wimbledon? London played host to another incredible tournament this year!

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Santana
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! Still bringing the heat with that guitar. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Classic Hits Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! His music transcends generations.

moments.title: Kim Carnes' 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Kim Carnes, famous for her distinctive voice on 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 today, July 20th.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 81st birthday to the legendary Kim Carnes! Her voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Kim Carnes on her 81st birthday today! An icon of the 80s and beyond.

moments.title: John Lodge's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: John Lodge, bassist and vocalist for The Moody Blues, celebrates his 81st birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Moody Blues legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to John Lodge of The Moody Blues! A true pioneer of progressive rock.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of John Lodge, the enduring bassist and vocalist for The Moody Blues, turning 81 today!

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a rock legend! Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79 on Wednesday. What's your favourite Eagles track he sang?

angles.name: Anticipating a birthday
angles.copy: Don Henley of The Eagles celebrates his 79th birthday this Wednesday. An incredible voice behind so many classic rock anthems.

moments.title: George Clinton's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Funk pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, will turn 85 on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funkadelic leader
angles.copy: Get down! The legendary funk innovator George Clinton celebrates his 85th birthday this Wednesday. What's your favourite P-Funk jam?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mr. Funk
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 85th birthday this Wednesday to the one and only George Clinton! The Godfather of Funk.

moments.title: Martin Gore's 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, songwriter and multi-instrumentalist for the iconic synth-pop band Depeche Mode, turns 65 on July 23rd.

angles.name: Synth-pop icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to Martin Gore of Depeche Mode this Thursday! A true architect of electronic music.

angles.name: Musical mastermind
angles.copy: Celebrating the songwriting genius of Martin Gore, who turns 65 on Thursday. Depeche Mode wouldn't be the same without him!

moments.title: Verdine White's 75th Birthday
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the dynamic bassist and co-founder of Earth, Wind & Fire, will celebrate his 75th birthday on July 25th.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire legend
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 this Saturday. What's your favourite EWF hit?

angles.name: Birthday funk
angles.copy: The iconic bassist Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday. Still bringing the funk to Earth, Wind & Fire!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Sir Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! The energy of The Rolling Stones frontman is unmatched.

angles.name: Rolling Stones legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on Sunday! Still got the moves. What's your favourite Stones track?

moments.title: Roger Taylor's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer for the rock band Queen, will turn 77 on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the legendary Roger Taylor of Queen this Sunday! A powerhouse behind the kit.

angles.name: Rock royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger Taylor's 77th birthday on Sunday! Queen's incredible drummer continues to inspire. What's your top Queen song?

moments.title: Darlene Love's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and Christmas classic 'Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)', turns 85 on July 26th.

angles.name: Soulful voice
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday this Sunday to the incredible Darlene Love! Her voice is truly timeless.

angles.name: Music legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing Darlene Love's 85th birthday on Sunday! An icon of the 60s and beyond.
